title: The Witch
content:
Toil and grow rich,
    What�s that but to lie
    With a foul witch
    And after, drained dry,
    To be brought
    To the chamber where
    Lies one long sought
    With despair.
meaning:
"The Witch" is a quintessential example of William Butler Yeats's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
